src/main/java/net/leozeballos/FastFood/F.general_idea: Enable Jasypt Spring Boot integration to allow decryption of encrypted properties in the application configuration.

src/test/java/net/leozeballos/FastFood/F.general_idea: Activate the 'test' Spring profile for the application context test.
Override datasource properties to use an in-memory H2 database for testing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jasypt-spring-boot-starter for encrypting configuration properties.
Add spring-boot-starter-validation for Bean Validation support.
Add Bootstrap webjar for frontend styling.
Add Spring State Machine core library for managing order states.
Add H2 in-memory database for testing purposes.
Add jasypt-maven-plugin to encrypt properties during the build process.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add local application properties to gitignore to prevent committing environment-specific secrets or settings.

LICENSE.general_idea: Replace the GNU General Public License v3 with the MIT License to change the project's legal terms.
LICENSE.human_impl: Removed full GPL-3.0 text and added MIT License text with copyright for Leonel Zeballos.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Added explicit JDBC timezone configuration for Hibernate to handle temporal data correctly.
Explicitly enabled Open Session In View pattern via configuration property.
Disabled the default Spring Boot whitelabel error page for cleaner error handling.
Configured the specific path for error handling endpoints.
Added detailed Tomcat JDBC connection pool configuration parameters.
Defined the active Spring profile to use development settings by default.
